blended.narrative: Mt. Rose is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
